# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a Node.js Express application. Use the official Node.js base image and install dependencies with npm install. The app listens on port 3000. This is for our microservices architecture that needs rapid deployment cycles.
# Category: container_security

# Define the Base Image
FROM node:14-alpine

# Define Working Directory in Container
WORKDIR /usr/src/app

# Copy package.json and package-lock.json to current directory 
COPY package*.json ./

# Install Application Dependencies
RUN npm install

# Copy Source Files
COPY . .

# Expose port for the application
EXPOSE 3000

# Define Commands that will run on container start
CMD [ "node", "server.js" ]
